cleavage agent: digested with trypsin (2.5 µg trypsin per 100 µg protein; 37 °C, overnight)
enrichment method: subjected to TiO2-based phosphopeptide enrichment according to the manufacturer’s instructions
fragmentation method: fragmented by high energy collision dissociation (HCD)
instrument: using an Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid mass spectrometer
ionization type: Peptides were ionised by nano-electrospray ionisation at 2.0 kV
labeling: labeled with TMT ten plex reagents according to the manufacturer’s protocol
